summary: Completed testing of Business Subscription Flow for Bookvia. All 13 backend tests passed and all 5 frontend UI tests passed. The new registration flow where subscription payment is the LAST step is working correctly. Business cannot login without paying subscription first (returns 403 subscription_required). After payment, verification email is sent and business can activate account.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/business/create-subscription returns 400 for missing email - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/create-subscription returns 400 for empty email - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/create-subscription returns 404 for non-existent business - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/create-subscription returns Stripe checkout URL for valid business with subscription_status='none' - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/create-subscription returns 400 for business already subscribed - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/verify-subscription returns 400 for missing session_id - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/verify-subscription returns 400 for empty session_id - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/verify-subscription returns 400 for invalid session_id - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/login returns 403 subscription_required for nosub@test.com - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/login works for testrealstripe@bookvia.com (trialing) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/login returns 401 for invalid credentials - PASSED
Backend: Normal user login (cliente@bookvia.com) still works - PASSED
Backend: Health endpoint returns healthy - PASSED
Frontend: Login page shows subscription_required banner after failed business login for nosub@test.com - PASSED
Frontend: 'Completar pago de suscripción' button appears in subscription banner - PASSED
Frontend: Business with subscription (testrealstripe@bookvia.com) logs in and redirects to dashboard - PASSED
Frontend: SubscriptionSuccessPage with ?from=register shows 'Verifica tu correo electrónico' message - PASSED
Frontend: SubscriptionSuccessPage with ?from=register shows 'Ir a iniciar sesión' button (not dashboard) - PASSED
Frontend: Normal user login (cliente@bookvia.com) works and shows '¡Bienvenido!' toast - PASSED
Frontend: Business register page shows 5 steps including 'Suscripción' as step 5 - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/auth/business/create-subscription correctly validates email and business existence
POST /api/auth/business/create-subscription returns Stripe checkout URL with ?from=register in success_url
POST /api/auth/business/verify-subscription validates session_id and sends verification email after payment
POST /api/auth/business/login correctly checks subscription_status and returns 403 subscription_required for 'none'
LoginPage.jsx correctly shows subscriptionRequired banner with 'Completar pago de suscripción' button
BusinessRegisterPage.jsx has 5 steps with 'Suscripción' as the final step
SubscriptionSuccessPage.jsx correctly handles ?from=register to show email verification message instead of dashboard button

business_without_subscription.login_path: /login (Negocio tab -> Soy el dueño) - returns 403 subscription_required

seed_data_creation: nosub@test.com was created directly in MongoDB for testing subscription_required flow (subscription_status='none', email_verified=true)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested Business Subscription Flow: 1) POST /api/auth/business/create-subscription returns Stripe checkout URL for businesses with subscription_status='none', 2) POST /api/auth/business/verify-subscription validates session_id and sends verification email, 3) POST /api/auth/business/login returns 403 subscription_required for businesses without subscription, 4) LoginPage shows subscription banner with payment button after failed login, 5) SubscriptionSuccessPage with ?from=register shows email verification message. Test business nosub@test.com has subscription_status='none' for testing.

mocked_apis.note: Stripe Checkout creates real sessions but actual payment page is Stripe-hosted (cannot complete payment in tests)

create_subscription_endpoint.error_handling: 400 for missing/empty email, 404 for non-existent business, 400 for already subscribed

verify_subscription_endpoint.side_effects: Updates business subscription_status to 'trialing', sends verification email

login_page_subscription_banner.shows: Banner with message and 'Completar pago de suscripción' button
login_page_subscription_banner.button_action: Calls authAPI.createRegistrationSubscription and redirects to Stripe
